error_signature: Failed to process request : Internal Server Error
title: Internal Server Error when saving Webhook URL
symptom: When trying to save the Webhook URL in n8n, an error message 'Failed to process request : Internal Server Error' appears.
applies_when: Webhook URL is set to production
not_this_if: Webhook URL is set to a test environment
All outcomes have a response configured
root_cause: The error occurs because the workflow does not have a response configured for every possible outcome. If the workflow reaches a path without a response, it will time out and trigger an internal server error.
fix_steps: Ensure that every outcome of the If node has a corresponding response to the webhook
agent_instruction: Configure responses for all outcomes in the workflow to avoid timeouts.
